ham.subject: Your Bank Account Transaction Alert – ₹5,000 Debit
ham.body:
Dear Mr. Sharma,

A transaction of ₹5,000 has been debited from your savings account ending in 1234 on 15 April 2026 at 10:32 AM. If you did not authorize this transaction, please contact us immediately at 1800 123 456 or visit our nearest branch.

For more details, click <URL>.

Thank you for banking with [Bank Name].

spam.subject: Urgent: FedEx Delivery Fee Pending – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Customer,

We regret to inform you that your FedEx parcel with tracking number XYZ123 was not successfully delivered on the scheduled date. As per FedEx policy, a missed delivery fee of ₹200 will be charged.

Aapka package deliver nahi hua, aapko ₹200 ka fee dena hoga. Please pay the fee within 48 hours to avoid further delay. For payment, click on the link below.
<URL>

If you have already made the payment, please disregard this notice. Thank you for choosing FedEx.
